channel.title: Signature on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Signature on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Yet another new work of Ric discovered!
item.description: Short description Another scene of ships in a harbour Notes : Taken from eBay . Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there is a post about it. Other entries for this work

item.title: Another new work of Ric discovered!
item.description: Short description Another street scene with a lantern and a wind mill (which isn’t red - as one can suspect if this should be Paris). Notes : Taken from eBay . Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there is a post about it. Other entries for this work

item.title: Another work of sailing boats by Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description: Another work of sailing boats by Fritz Neumann. Notes: Found on eBay . There is a sticker on the back, but it’s unreadable. Interestingly, the picture is attributed to a Ric Neumann

item.title: Good old Fritz in Paris
item.description: Short description: Paris, Montmartre with the Basilica of the Sacred Heart of Paris , commonly known as Sacré-Cœur Basilica in the background. Notes: Found by Wolfgang Barina on eBay Kleinanzeigen

item.title: Sailing boats (Ric 06)
item.description: Short description: Sailing Boats Notes: Sold originally in Paderborn, see label. Other entries for this work

item.title: More sailing boats (Ric 05)
item.description: Short description : Sailing Boats Notes : Taken from eBay . Other entries for this work

item.title: New work of Ric discovered!
item.description: Short description : A bird, maybe a Marabou Notes : Taken from eBay. Other entries for this work

item.title: A german shepherd (Fritz Neumann)
item.description: Short description : A German Shepherd Notes : Bought in Göttingen.

item.title: Large sailing ship by Ric (Ric 25)
item.description: Short description: Large sailing ship Notes : Other entries for this work

item.title: Sailing boats (Ric 10)
item.description: Short description : Sailing Boats Notes : Taken from eBay . Other entries for this work

item.title: An etching of a wind mill by (some) Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description : An etching of a wind mill by (some) Fritz Neumann Notes : Taken from eBay , probably not “our” Fritz Neumann.

item.title: Two prints by Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description : Two prints by Fritz Neumann, sailings boats and a black-headed gull. Notes : Works by our Fritz Neumann with typical maritime subjects.

item.title: The different signatures of our Fritz Neumann
item.description: One possibility to distinguish between our different Fritz Neumann’s is to compare the signature. The following list shows examples of Fritz Neumanns signatures, the source images are linked in the image caption: Signature our Fritz Neumann, taken from this post Signature our Fritz Neumann, taken from this post Signature our Fritz Neumann, taken from this post Signature our Fritz Neumann, taken from this post

item.title: Sailing boats (Ric 07)
item.description: Short description: Sailing boats Notes: Taken from auctionet.com . Slightly different colouring then other versions . Other entries for this work

item.title: Sailing boats (Ric 07)
item.description: Short description: Sailing boats Notes: Slightly different colouring then other versions . Other entries for this work

item.title: A stair alley (Ric 14)
item.description: Short description: A stair (alley) Notes: Better quality then the first entry for this . Other entries for this work

item.title: Dürers "Praying Hands" - Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description: An etching after Albrecht Dürer’s &ldquo;Preying Hands&rdquo; by Fritz Neumann. Even if the motif and style doesn’t match, the signature does. Notes: No blind stamp visible.

item.title: A signature of Fritz Neumann (1881 - 1919)
item.description: A signature of Fitz Neumann (1881 - 1919), taken from findartinfo.com . His subjects are mostly Cossacks, he was a painter.

item.title: Sailing boat (Ric 05)
item.description: Short description: Sailing boat Notes: See Antik Bayreuth Other entries for this work

item.title: Sailing boats (Ric 06)
item.description: Short description: Sailing Boats Notes: Sold originaly in Bremerhaven, see label. The shop still seem to exist. Other entries for this work

item.title: Sailing boats by Ric (Ric 16)
item.description: Short description: Sailing boats Notes : Other entries for this work

item.title: Three boats (Ric 06)
item.description: Short description: Three boats Notes: Found on eBay and on Worthpoint Other entries for this work

item.title: Three birds (Ric 09)
item.description: Short description: Three birds Notes: See Antik Bayreuth Other entries for this work
